---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product or platform improvement for RAGPilot
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the requested capability briefly.

## Product Goal

Explain which real RAGPilot workflow this strengthens.

The preferred direction is to support the main product chain:

`Identity -> Scope -> Knowledge Base -> Documents -> Workflows -> Retrieval -> Chat -> Agents -> Governance`

## Proposed Surface

Where should this live?

- Home
- Chat
- Documents
- Operations
- Agents
- Admin
- Settings
- API
- Worker

## Why Now

Explain the current pain, blocker, or missing operator/admin capability.

## Out of Scope

Call out anything this request should not expand into.

## Notes

Add mockups, examples, or related context if useful.
